style_authority.note: Separates shared product semantics from platform-native navigation, controls, typography, materials, motion, and adaptive layout.

reference_selection.note: Applies product context, iOS, Android, adaptive, accessibility, interaction, design-system, and validation guidance.

anti_generic_redesign.note: Repairs native trust and task flow without proposing identical mockups, decorative styling, or Web-shaped controls.

evidence_level.note: Labels the review static/prose-only and denies source, build, simulator, emulator, device, accessibility-tree, and performance proof.

verified_boundary.note: Separates described violations from unknown source details, targets, runtime navigation, gestures, accessibility trees, persistence, and device results.

design_moves.note: Provides platform navigation, size-class layouts, target sizes, scalable type, native controls, semantic theming, accessible motion, recovery, and parity guidance.

scope_control.note: Stays read-only and platform-conformance focused, but 161 lines modestly exceed the requested 150-line budget.
